a:["$","$L1b",null,{"code":"# Edit crontab\ncrontab -e\n\n# Daily consolidation at 3 AM via Hermes\n0 3 * * * cd /path/to/project && hermes mnemosyne sleep >> /var/log/mnemosyne/consolidate.log 2>&1\n\n# Daily backup at 4 AM\n0 4 * * * /opt/mnemosyne/venv/bin/mnemosyne backup --output-dir /backups >> /var/log/mnemosyne/backup.log 2>&1\n","language":"bash"}]
